title: Prompt Chaining
topic: Prompt chaining breaks a task into a fixed sequence of LLM calls, where each step uses the previous output and optional programmatic checks can stop bad intermediate results.
publishInstruction: For a retry after TikTok/Facebook app permissions are fixed, use --reuse-video with this English videoPath instead of regenerating keyframes, audio, or video. Avoid reposting YouTube unless an intentional duplicate upload is desired.
